commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Simplified Chinese main and About taglines to use Latin “Token” instead of “词元”.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a localization copy PR rather than a bug report. The relevant check is source inspection of the two changed zh-Hans string values.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed for the copy preference and contributor proof gate; there is no narrow code defect for ClawSweeper to repair.

target.title: Refine Simplified Chinese token tagline
target.body:
## Summary

- Update the Simplified Chinese tagline to use “Token” instead of “词元”
- Keep the existing informal “你” tone for consistency with the rest of zh-Hans localization
- Apply the same wording to the About tagline

## Why

“Token” is more natural in Chinese developer-facing AI product copy than the more literal “词元”, while still matching the English source text:

> May your tokens never run out—keep agent limits in view.

## Testing

- Not run; localization-only text change
target.author: jerry-codehub
